nasb.text: Jesus, full of the Holy Spirit, returned from the Jordan and was led around by the Spirit in the wilderness

esv.text: And Jesus, full of the Holy Spirit, returned from the Jordan and was led by the Spirit in the wilderness

cnv.text: 耶穌被聖靈充滿，從約旦河回來，聖靈引他到曠野，

ccb.text: 耶稣被圣灵充满，从约旦河回来后，随圣灵的引导来到旷野，

csbs.text: 耶稣充满圣灵，从约旦河回来，被圣灵带到旷野，
